description:
Streamline your systems management

Scan, collect, and organize your on-prem Windows machines so deployments go exactly where you need them to with PDQ Inventory.
New Features
- Added High Contrast theme support for improved accessibility
- Added dynamic dashboard with customizable widget library for existing widgets (future widgets planned)

Bug Fixes
- Improve memory management related to RBAC window
- Fixed OAuth2 mail authentication failures showing a cryptic serialization error instead of the real error message
- Inventory: Improve memory management related to Auto Reports
- Inventory: Prevent lost changes to Dynamic Collections after refresh. Fix console behavior related to Static Collection deletion.
